200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Tank

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while, burning axes fall on all enemies in a small radius around Firewing. All affected units take magic damage equal to 4% of their max health for each enemy in a small radius around the Firewing.

description 4/6

Once in a while, burning axes fall on all enemies in a small radius around Firewing. All affected units take magic damage equal to 6% of their max health for each enemy in a small radius around the Firewing. Firewing steals 10% damage and physical and magic armor for 5 sec from all enemies hit by axes. Up to 8 effects. Firewing also restores 1% health for each enemy hit by an axe.

description 6/6

Once in a while, burning axes fall on all enemies in a small radius around Firewing. All affected units take magic damage equal to 8% of their max health for each enemy in a small radius around the Firewing. Firewing steals 15% damage and physical and magic armor for 6 sec from all enemies hit by axes. Up to 16 effects. Firewing also restores 5% health for each enemy hit by an axe. All enemies hit by an axe are marked with a fire mark and can’t restore health for 6 sec. When an enemy with a fire mark dies, the cooldown time of burning axes is reduced by 1 sec. For each enemy hit by a fire axe, all allies have their max health increased by 10% for 6 sec.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

When taking damage, with a 25% chance, Firewing may drop burning axe on the attacker. The axe deals magic damage equal to 8% of the target’s maximum health.

description 4/6

When taking damage, with a 25% chance, Firewing may drop burning axe on the attacker. The axe deals magic damage equal to 10% of the target’s maximum health. On hit, burning axes deal additional magic damage equal to 10% of Firewing’s max health and have a 75% chance to remove a random positive effect.

description 6/6

When taking damage, with a 25% chance, Firewing may drop burning axe on the attacker. The axe deals magic damage equal to 12% of the target’s maximum health. On hit, burning axes deal additional magic damage equal to 10% of Firewing’s max health and have a 75% chance to remove a random positive effect. On hit, burning axes tear through the targets armor. When the enemy’s armor is torn, that enemy takes 125000 pure damage and has their physical armor reduced by 35% for 6 sec. Up to 5 effects. The enemy also takes 350000 physical damage for 6 sec.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

For each enemy in the small area around the Firewing, their incoming damage is reduced by 7%.

description 4/6

For each enemy in the small area around the Firewing, their incoming damage is reduced by 7%. Firewing steals 10% fortitude and dodge from all enemies hit by burning axes for 6 sec. Up to 2 effects.

description 6/6

For each enemy in the small area around the Firewing, their incoming damage is reduced by 7%. Firewing steals 10% fortitude and dodge from all enemies hit by burning axes for 6 sec. Up to 2 effects. When Firewing summons a burning axe, all allies are gain restoration. It removes a random negative effect and restores 250000 health. It also increases their damage by 25% and health by 15% for 6 sec.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

Burning axes stun targets for 1 sec.

description 4/6

Burning axes stun targets for 1 sec. On hit, burning axes increase incoming damage to the target by 25% for 6 sec.

description 6/6

Burning axes stun targets for 1 sec. On hit, burning axes increase incoming damage to the target by 25% for 6 sec. All enemy units hit by burning axes have their attack speed and accuracy reduced by 25% for 6 sec. Also, burning axes increases attack, crit, and accuracy of all allies by 25% for 6 sec.

Materials

Goblet of Fire
Mark of the Phoenix
